ClinicalDocument.title: C-CDA R2.1 Patient Record: Freeda113 Lawana430 Stamm704

section.title: Allergies
section.text: There are no current allergies at the time of this document's creation.

tr.td: Assessment of health and social care needs (procedure)
Assessment using Alcohol Use Disorders Identification Test - Consumption (procedure)
Removal of supragingival plaque and calculus from all teeth using dental instrument (procedure)

section.text: There is no current social history except smoking status.
